locations.name: 肯尼亚山
locations.summary: 肯尼亚山（英語：Mount Kenya）为肯尼亚第一高峰及非洲第二高峰，仅次于乞力马扎罗山。最高主峰为巴蒂安峰（5,199米（17,057英尺））、内利恩峰（5,188米（17,021英尺））及勒纳纳峰（4,985米（16,355英尺））…

locations.name: 上几内亚
locations.summary: 几内亚共和國（法語：République de Guinée），通稱几内亚（Guinée），是位於西非的國家，東南接科特迪瓦，南臨利比里亞，西鄰塞拉利昂，北鄰几内亚比绍、塞内加尔，北和東北與馬里接壤。尼日尔河、塞内加尔河、冈比亚河在几内亚…

locations.name: Lower Guinea
locations.summary: Lower Guinea may refer to: Maritime Guinea, the coastal region of the republic of Guinea.

locations.name: East African montane forests
locations.summary: The East African montane forests is a montane tropical moist forest ecoregion of eastern Africa.

locations.name: 阿伯德爾山脈
locations.summary: The Aberdare Range (formerly the Sattima Range, Kikuyu: Nyandarua) is a 160 km (99 mi) long mountain range of upland, n…

locations.name: 梅魯火山
locations.summary: 梅魯火山（Mount Meru）是非洲坦桑尼亞的層狀火山，這座海拔4,566米的活火山是非洲第十大高山，上一次火山爆發發生在約一百年前。 梅魯火山的土壤肥沃，是多種野生生物的棲息地，其中包括猴子、豹和接近400種鳥類。

locations.name: 埃爾貢山
locations.summary: 埃爾貢山（英語：Mount Elgon）是非洲東部的盾狀死火山，位於基蘇木以北的烏干達和肯雅接壤邊境，直徑80公里，面積3,500平方公里，有5個主要山峰，高度分別為海拔4,321米、4,302米、4,222米、4,211米和4,161米…

locations.name: 卡卡梅加
locations.summary: 卡卡梅加（Kakamega）是東非國家肯雅的城鎮，也是西部省的首府，位於基蘇木以北52公里的維多利亞湖畔，是該湖的港口城市，距離赤道僅30公里，主要經濟活動是農業和漁業，2009年人口99,987。

relations.subject: Olive ibis
relations.evidence: akleyorum occurs in the montane forests of eastern Africa at altitudes of 1,800-12,000 m above sea level. It is found in the eastern DRCongo, on Mount Kenya and in the Aberdares of Kenya, Kilimanjaro in Tanzania, on Mount Meru and on Mount Elgon; but is apparently absent from lowland forests in east Africa such as the Kakamega tropical rainforest in Kenya.Brooks T

relations.subject: Olive ibis
relations.evidence: Malimbus 11: 104-116. Alongside its dense forest habitat, it has also been recorded in regenerating forest in Gabon and cliff holes. The different subspecies inhabit different geographical regions in Africa

relations.subject: Olive ibis
relations.evidence: Scopus 20: 84. It is readily distinguished from the similar hadada ibis by elevation of habitat since the latter occurs at altitudes in this region of less than 6,000 feet. The olive ibis may be the only resident African species to inhabit only lowland tropical forests in West Africa and only higher-altitude montane forests in the East. The olive ibis is probably largely sedentary, although short migrations appear to happen in Liberia in extremely dry weather; during which individuals move from northern Grand Gedeh county to regions further south such as Glaro, Sapo and Sinoe
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
